Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants Luxor Cab Company, Inc.'s Motion To Compel ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was not timely filed as it was filed on July 15, 2008. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
